mapper.sql:
( SELECT fin_prdt_cd, max_save_trm, max_intr_rate, max_intr_rate2, deposit_product_id FROM ( SELECT fin_prdt_cd, save_trm AS max_save_trm, intr_rate AS max_intr_rate, intr_rate2 AS max_intr_rate2, deposit_product_id,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY fin_prdt_cd ORDER BY CASE WHEN save_trm = 12 THEN 1 -- 가장 우선 WHEN save_trm < 12 THEN 2 -- 그 다음 ELSE 3 -- 제외 대상 END, save_trm DESC -- 같은 우선순위면 큰 기간 먼저 ) AS rn FROM deposit_option ) tmp WHERE rn = 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT dp.kor_co_nm AS bank_name, dp.fin_prdt_nm AS product_name, dp.etc_note AS etc_note, opt.max_save_trm, opt.max_intr_rate, opt.max_intr_rate2, opt.deposit_product_id, COALESCE(like_stats.like_count, 0) AS like_count, CASE WHEN fav.deposit_product_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_favorite, CASE WHEN ul.deposit_product_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_liked FROM deposit_product dp LEFT JOIN opt ON dp.fin_prdt_cd = opt.fin_prdt_cd /* 전체 좋아요 수 */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT deposit_product_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM user_likes WHERE deposit_product_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY deposit_product_id ) like_stats ON opt.deposit_product_id = like_stats.deposit_product_id /* 로그인 사용자의 즐겨찾기 여부 */ LEFT JOIN user_favorites fav ON opt.deposit_product_id = fav.deposit_product_id AND fav.user_id = #{userId} /* ✅ 로그인 사용자의 좋아요 여부 */ LEFT JOIN user_likes ul ON opt.deposit_product_id = ul.deposit_product_id AND ul.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY opt.max_intr_rate DESC

SELECT dp.kor_co_nm as bank_name, dp.fin_prdt_nm as product_name, dp.etc_note as etc_note, opt.max_save_trm, opt.max_intr_rate, opt.max_intr_rate2, opt.deposit_product_id, COALESCE(like_stats.like_count, 0) AS like_count, false AS is_favorite FROM deposit_product dp LEFT JOIN opt ON dp.fin_prdt_cd = opt.fin_prdt_cd LEFT JOIN ( SELECT deposit_product_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM user_likes WHERE deposit_product_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY deposit_product_id ) like_stats ON opt.deposit_product_id = like_stats.deposit_product_id WHERE dp.kor_co_nm = #{bankName} ORDER BY opt.max_intr_rate DESC
